about.desc: Wurin aiki na CAD/CAM da iko mai amfani da yawa wanda ke aiki a cikin birawsa don injunan CNC na sha'awa/tebur (GRBL, grblHAL, FluidNC, Marlin da sauransu) — sassaka CNC, zane-zane, zanen alkalami, sayar da kai, hanyar warewar PCB, yankan laser da walda.
about.tag: Wurin aiki na CAD/CAM na birawsa
about.title: Game da karmyogi

ai.intro: Bayyana aiki cikin sauqin kalmomi sannan samfurin zai rubuta G-code na GRBL gareshi. Wannan na aiki gaba daya a cikin birawsar ka ta amfani da makullin API naka (ko zaman shiga da aka liko) — babu sabar.

ai.safety: G-code da AI ya samar na iya zama kuskure ko mara aminci. KOYAUSHE duba shi a Mai Nuna ka yi gwajin bushewa (Z a daga / spindle a kashe) kafin yankan. Kada ka taqa gudanar da shi ba tare da kulawa ba.

cc.tabHeightTip: Kayan da aka bari a qarqashin kowane tab, daga kasan kaya zuwa sama
cc.tabLengthTip: Fadin kowane tab tare da kewaye
cc.tipBitLength: Tsawon yanke mai amfani na bit — zurfin da zai iya kaiwa. Ka rage jimlar zurfin sassakar fiye da wannan domin shank na bit kada ya shafa kaya.
cc.tipBitType: Siffar yankan ka. Flat = kasa madaidaiciya (pockets/profiles); Ball = qarshe mai zagaye (santsi 3D relief). Wannan na zabar samfurin kayan aiki daidai don sassaka.
cc.tipBitWidth: Diamita na yanke na bit naka. Bit mai fadi na share da sauri amma na rasa fine detail; bit mai siriri na sannu amma mai fine. Dukan saurin/zurfi a kasa an saita su don wannan fadi.
cc.tipCuttingSpeed: Yadda bit ke motsa yayin yanke — an samar ta atomatik daga kaya + bit domin ya yanke da kyau ba tare da tsayawa ba. Sauya idan ka san fiye.
cc.tipDepthPass: Yawan kayan da kowane bugu na kasa ke cirewa — an kiyaye shi qaranci domin bit + kayan aikinka su tsaya cikin aminci. Rage shi don kaya mai tauri.
cc.tipFreeSpeed: Saurin motsi da ba na yanke tsakanin yankan. Tsoho zuwa matsakaicin inji (rapid); rage shi idan rapids sun yi qarfi.
cc.tipMaterial: Abin da kake yanke. Tare da bit, wannan na yanke shawara akan feeds aminci, saurin spindle da zurfin yanke. Danna swatch don zaba; danna hotonsa don cikakkun bayanai.
cc.tipPlungeZ: Yadda bit ke kai tsaye KASA cikin kaya. An saita ta atomatik zuwa kaso aminci na saurin yanke — rage shi idan bit naka na rawar jiki yayin shiga.
cc.tipPullUp: Yadda bit ke janyewa daga yankan. 0 = matsakaici (rapid G0). Saita ƙima (mm/min) don daga a hankali.
cc.tipSafeZ: Tsayin da bit ke daga zuwa kafin motsa a kan kaya. Dole ya wuce duk clamps da sashen samfurin mafi tsayi.
cc.tipSpindle: Saurin spindle da aka ba da shawara don wannan kaya — sannu don plastics/qarfe, sauri don itace. Sauya don bit/spindle naka.
cc.tipStepover: Gibin gefe tsakanin layukan yanke — mafi fine na nufin santsi amma sannu.

ctrl.explain.feedOverride.body: Faifan kai tsaye don hanzartawa ko rage aikin da ke gudana ba tare da gyara shi ba, ana nuna shi a matsayin kaso na feed da aka tsara. Rage shi idan yankan ya yi qarfi ko na fama; 100% na gudana a saurin da aka shirya. Lafiya a gyara yayin yankan.
ctrl.explain.feedOverride.title: Sauyawar feed
ctrl.explain.feedRate.body: Saurin da kayan aiki ke motsa cikin kaya yayin yanke, a mm kowace minti. Mafi sauri na sauri amma mai wahala ga bit; mafi sannu na sannu kuma mai tsabta. Fara a hankali ka qara kawai idan yankan ya tsaya santsi.
ctrl.explain.feedRate.title: Adadin feed
ctrl.explain.jogStep.body: Yawan motsin inji kowane lokacin da ka danna maballin jog (kibiya) — misali 0.1, 1, ko 10 mm. Manyan matakai na motsa da sauri a kan tebur; qananan matakai na barin ka tura daidai. Yi amfani da qananan matakai kusa da aikin.
ctrl.explain.jogStep.title: Matakin jog
ctrl.explain.rapidOverride.body: Iko kai tsaye don yadda motsin (tafiya) da BA na yanke ke tafiya, a matsayin kaso na cikakken sauri. Rage shi (25% ko 50%) yayin gwajin sabon aiki domin motsin sauri su zama sauqin kallo da tsayarwa. 100% shine cikakken saurin tafiya.
ctrl.explain.rapidOverride.title: Sauyawar rapid
ctrl.explain.spindleOverride.body: Faifan kai tsaye don daga ko rage saurin juyawa yayin da aikin ke gudana, a matsayin kaso na RPM da aka tsara. Rage shi idan kaya na qonewa, qara idan bit na nutsewa. 100% na gudana a saurin da aka shirya.
ctrl.explain.spindleOverride.title: Sauyawar spindle
ctrl.explain.spindleRpm.body: Yadda kayan yanke ke juyawa, a juyi kowace minti. Manyan saurin sun dace da qananan bits da kaya mai laushi; sauri sosai na iya qona itace ko narke plastic, sannu sosai na iya guntule bit. Bi taswirar bit/kaya, ko fara matsakaici.

explain.bit.body: Kayan yanke da aka sanya a spindle, an bayyana shi da nau'insa da fadi. Aikin na amfani da shi don saita girman yankan ya shirya bugawa, don haka dole ya dace da abin da aka sanya. Sauya saitin duk lokacin da ka canza bit na zahiri.
explain.bit.title: Bit
explain.cutDepthPerPass.body: Yawan kayan da aka cire a bugu daya na kasa. Daukar qaranci kowane bugu na laushi ga bit yana ba da yankan mai tsabta, amma na bukatar bugawa fiye. Wuri mai aminci na farawa shine kusan rabin fadin bit ko qasa.
explain.cutDepthPerPass.title: Zurfi kowane bugu
explain.cutSpeed.body: Yadda bit ke tafiya gefe cikin kaya yayin yanke. Mafi sauri na gamawa da wuri amma na matsa bit da motar; mafi sannu na tsabta da aminci. Fara sannu a sabon kaya ka qara idan ya yanke santsi.
explain.cutSpeed.title: Saurin yanke (adadin feed)
explain.feedOverride.body: Faifan kai tsaye don hanzartawa ko rage aikin da ke gudana ba tare da gyara shi ba, ana nuna shi a matsayin kaso na feed da aka tsara. Rage shi idan yankan ya yi qarfi ko na fama; 100% na gudana a saurin da aka shirya. Lafiya a gyara yayin yankan.
explain.feedOverride.title: Sauyawar feed
explain.feedRate.body: Saurin da kayan aiki ke motsa cikin kaya yayin yanke, a mm kowace minti. Mafi sauri na sauri amma mai wahala ga bit; mafi sannu na sannu kuma mai tsabta. Fara a hankali ka qara kawai idan yankan ya tsaya santsi.
explain.feedRate.title: Adadin feed
explain.finishing.body: Bugu na qarshe mai sauqi wanda ke cire siririn Layer na qarshe don santsi, daidaitaccen saman. Yana cire kadan, don haka mai laushi da daidai. Yi amfani da shi bayan roughing idan ingancin saman ya zama muhimmi.
explain.finishing.title: Bugu na gamawa
explain.freeSpeed.body: Yadda inji ke motsa idan BA ya yanke — sake matsawa a iska a tsayi aminci. Wannan na iya zama da sauri tunda ba a yanke komai. Rage shi idan motsin sauri na rawar jiki ko inji na rasa matsayi.
explain.freeSpeed.title: Saurin tafiya (rapid)
explain.jogStep.body: Yawan motsin inji kowane lokacin da ka danna maballin jog (kibiya) — misali 0.1, 1, ko 10 mm. Manyan matakai na motsa da sauri a kan tebur; qananan matakai na barin ka tura daidai. Yi amfani da qananan matakai kusa da aikin.
explain.jogStep.title: Matakin jog
explain.material.body: Abin da kake yanke — kamar itace, plastic, aluminium, ko PCB. Yana jagorantar saurin da zurfi masu ma'ana, tunda kowane kaya na yankewa daban. Zabar daidai na taimaka guje wa qonewa, narkewa, ko karya bit.
explain.material.title: Kaya
explain.plungeFeed.body: Yadda bit ke kai tsaye KASA cikin kaya kafin kowane yanke. Kasa na da wahala fiye da yanke gefe, don haka wannan na sannu fiye da saurin yanke. Sauri sosai na iya karya bit; ka kiyaye shi a hankali.
explain.plungeFeed.title: Saurin plunge
explain.probeDistance.body: Mafi nisan da kayan aiki zai yi kasa yana neman faranti kafin ya daina ya tsaya da alaram. Iyaka ce ta aminci domin kayan aiki kada ya ci gaba da turawa idan bai taba ba. Saita shi kadan fiye da gibin da ake tsammani.
explain.probeDistance.title: Matsakaicin nisan probe
explain.probeFeed.body: Yadda kayan aiki ke saukowa zuwa faranti na taba yayin neman saman. Sannu na daidaita kuma aminci, tunda yana tsayawa lokacin da ya taba. Ka kiyaye shi sannu — babu bukatar gaggawa a probe.
explain.probeFeed.title: Saurin probe
explain.rapidOverride.body: Iko kai tsaye don yadda motsin (tafiya) da BA na yanke ke tafiya, a matsayin kaso na cikakken sauri. Rage shi (25% ko 50%) yayin gwajin sabon aiki domin motsin sauri su zama sauqin kallo da tsayarwa. 100% shine cikakken saurin tafiya.
explain.rapidOverride.title: Sauyawar rapid
explain.roughing.body: Bugu na farko mai sauri wanda ke share mafi yawan kayan zubewa, yana barin kadan a baya. Yana yin aiki mai nauyi da sauri ba tare da damuwa game da gamawa mai kyau ba. Bi shi da bugu na gamawa don santsi saman.
explain.roughing.title: Bugu na roughing
explain.safeZ.body: Tsayin da bit ke daga zuwa kafin motsa gefe, domin ya wuce aikin da clamps. Mafi girma = mafi aminci amma kadan sannu; qaranci sosai na iya sa bit ya buga aikin ko clamps. Mm kadan fiye da sama yawanci aminci ne.
explain.safeZ.title: Tsayi aminci (Safe-Z)
explain.spindleOverride.body: Faifan kai tsaye don daga ko rage saurin juyawa yayin da aikin ke gudana, a matsayin kaso na RPM da aka tsara. Rage shi idan kaya na qonewa, qara idan bit na nutsewa. 100% na gudana a saurin da aka shirya.
explain.spindleOverride.title: Sauyawar spindle
explain.spindleRpm.body: Yadda kayan yanke ke juyawa, a juyi kowace minti. Manyan saurin sun dace da qananan bits da kaya mai laushi; sauri sosai na iya qona itace ko narke plastic, sannu sosai na iya guntule bit. Bi taswirar bit/kaya, ko fara matsakaici.
explain.spindleRpm.title: Saurin spindle (RPM)
explain.stepover.body: Yawan motsin gefe na bit tsakanin bugu makwabta yayin share wuri. Qananan matakai na barin saman santsi amma na daukar lokaci fiye; manyan matakai na sauri amma mafi rougha. Kusan 40–50% na fadin bit shine ma'auni mai kyau.
explain.stepover.title: Mataki (stepover)
explain.toolDiameter.body: Fadin bit na yanke. Inji na amfani da shi don kiyaye girman yankan daidai da rarraba bugawa, don haka dole ya dace da bit da aka sanya. Auna bit idan ba ka da tabbas — kuskuren ƙima na sa sassa girman da bai dace ba.
explain.toolDiameter.title: Diamitar kayan aiki
explain.toolType.body: Irin bit da aka sanya — flat end mill, V-bit, ball-nose, drill, ko alkalami. Yana canza siffar da kayan aiki ke yankewa da yadda ake qididdige toolpaths. Zabi wanda ya dace da bit a spindle.
explain.toolType.title: Nau'in kayan aiki
explain.totalDepth.body: Yawan zurfin yankan qarshe gaba daya, ana kaiwa cikin bugu da yawa. Saita shi zuwa kaurin kayan don yanke gaba daya, ko qasa don sassaka rami. Kasa fiye da kayan zai yanke cikin abin da ke qasa.
explain.totalDepth.title: Jimlar zurfin yanke
explain.workZero.body: Wurin a kan kayan da ake la'akari da X0 Y0 Z0 — inda ake auna aikin daga. Yawanci kusurwa ko tsakiyar kaya, da Z0 a saman. Saita wannan kafin yankan domin aikin ya sauka inda kake tsammani.

Haka kuma ba shi da yarjejeniya na serial irin ta GRBL na host-streaming, don haka karmyogi ba zai iya haxawa kai tsaye ko karanta/rubuta saituna ba.
motion.masso.workflow.body: Yi amfani da karmyogi a matsayin CAD/CAM + mai samar da G-code: zana ko shigo da aikinka, samar da G-code aminci, sannan kwafa fayil din .nc/.gcode zuwa USB stick ka gudanar da shi daga pendant na Masso. Saita feeds, homing, soft limits, spindle da probing a kan allon taɓa na Masso da kansa.

weld.field.plungeF.body: Adadin feed da ake amfani da shi don saukar torch daga Safe-Z zuwa Z na walda.
weld.field.postFlow.body: Dakata na gas (G4 P) bayan arc ya tsaya, kafin janyewa. 0 = babu.
weld.field.preFlow.body: Dakata na gas (G4 P) bayan saukowa amma kafin arc ya buga. 0 = babu.
weld.field.safeZ.body: Tsayin daga da aka tabbatar kafin duk tafiyar XY da a qarshen shiri.
weld.field.segs.body: Maki da aka samo kowane zagayen weave. Mafi girma = mafi santsi sine/circular curves a farashin layukan G-code fiye.
weld.field.useArc.body: Fitar M3/M5 kewaye da kowane dinki. Kashe don motsa hanya ba tare da buga arc ba (gwajin bushewa).
weld.field.weldFeed.body: Saurin tafiyar torch tare da dinki (mm/min).
weld.intro: Yana walda dinki daya ko fiye masu madaidaici da weave na gefe. Fitar spindle na tuka welder/arc (M3 kunne, M5 kashe) da dakata na gas pre/post-flow. Shirin na daidaita kansa zuwa shafin Shiri don tsalle.
weld.live.title: Layuka an daidaita ta atomatik zuwa shafin Shiri
weld.load.bad: Ba a iya lodawa ba — ba fayil din walda mai inganci ba.
weld.motion.body: Feed na walda shine yadda torch ke tafiya tare da dinki. Safe-Z shine daga da aka tabbatar; plunge feed na saukowa zuwa Z na walda.
weld.motion.title: Tafiya & motsi
weld.notConnected: Ba a haxa ba — bita na kai tsaye; haxa daga shafin Shiri don tsalle.
weld.objects.title: Abubuwan walda
weld.seams.title: Dinkin walda
weld.table.empty: Babu dinki tukuna. Danna + don qara daya, sannan ⇤ / ⇥ don yin rikodin matsayin inji.
weld.title: Walda
weld.toolbar.add.body: Qara dinkin walda madaidaici da za ka iya gyarawa (farko, qarshe, Z na walda).
weld.toolbar.addCircle.body: Qara waldar da'ira (tsakiya {x,y,z} + radius), an bi kewaye a cikin filin XY.
weld.toolbar.addLine.body: Qara layin walda 3D (farko {x,y,z} → qarshe {x,y,z}) da za ka iya gyarawa.
weld.toolbar.clear.body: Cire kowane dinki ka sake farawa.
weld.toolbar.connect: Haxa zuwa inji don kama matsayinsa kai tsaye.
weld.toolbar.recCenter.body: Saita TSAKIYAR da'ira da aka zaba {x,y,z} daga matsayin inji kai tsaye.
weld.toolbar.recEnd.body: Saita QARSHEN dinkin da aka zaba daga matsayin inji kai tsaye.
weld.toolbar.recStart.body: Saita FARKON dinkin da aka zaba (da Z na walda) daga matsayin inji kai tsaye.
weld.toolbar.settings.body: Tsarin weave + amplitude/pitch, feeds na walda & plunge, ikon arc, da gas pre/post-flow.
weld.weave.body: Oscillation na gefe da aka sanya daidai-daidai da dinki don fadada bead. Amplitude shine rabin-fadi; pitch shine tafiyar gaba kowane cikakken zagaye (qaramin pitch = sauri, weave mai matse).
weld.weave.patSpeed.body: Sauri na biyu, mai zaman kansa (mm/min) wanda ke saita yadda weave ke oscillating da sauri. Yawa = saurin-tsari ÷ saurin-tafiya: babban saurin tsari na matse zagaye fiye kowane mm (weave mai yawa), qarami na shimfida su.
weld.weave.title: Tsarin weave
